mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment rates signal deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce corporate earnings visibility, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite rising unemployment.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in industrial production and GDP growth signal a contraction in real economic activity, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO and GDPC1 both decline > 2% YoY
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of instances where both INDPRO and GDPC1 decline.

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles, indicated by federal funds rates above 4.5%, increase discount rates and reduce equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals expanding manufacturing activity, which boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO rises.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in consumer spending and housing starts indicates strong demand conditions, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and HOUST both rise > 1% MoM
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances where both RSAFS and HOUST rise.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 3% YoY signals central bank intervention and higher discount rates, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 3%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer spending signals robust demand conditions, which boost corporate revenues and drive positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances where RSAFS rises.
